title: Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
company: Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners:
Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners!
